params.name: Bastet Bronze Statue
params.description:
On Dec 25, 600 BC, the ancient Egyptians cast this bronze statue to pray to the goddess Bastet.
This bronze statue was cast out of people's worship of the goddess Bastet. Bastet is the cat god in ancient Egypt mythology, with the image of a cat-headed person, symbolizing the charm of the moon and women; The guardian in the form of a cat was believed to bring happiness and joy to the family. During the Seventeenth Dynasty, people's admiration for her peaked, and many objects and small statues …
